name: Aligos Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness. Overview We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing novel therapeutics to address unmet medical needs in liver diseases and viral infections, including in the areas of chronic hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection, metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH), obesity, and coronavirus infections (e.g., SARSCoV2, SARSCoV, MERSCoV, and other related infections). The Aligos team has a demonstrated track record of success in drug development ...
